tasks.subject: Task 1: InsertPick sqlc query
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the insert query and regenerate sqlc so db.Queries gains InsertPick + InsertPickParams.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/internal/db/query/picks.sql
- Generated: backend/internal/db/picks.sql.go (do not hand-edit)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/picks.sql", "backend/internal/db/picks.sql.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just sqlc regenerates cleanly", "InsertPickParams has GroupID/PickerID/IsCredited/ScheduledFor", "go build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Pure pick validation + response mapping
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pure, unit-tested validatePickRequest and toPickResponse (and DTO types) in a new picks.go.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/picks.go
- Create: backend/picks_test.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/picks.go", "backend/picks_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run '^TestValidatePickRequest$|^TestToPickResponse$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["validatePickRequest defaults isCredited true and errors on bad UUID/date", "toPickResponse formats scheduledFor YYYY-MM-DD and createdAt RFC3339", "unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: POST /groups/{groupId}/picks handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add createPickHandler + pickStore interface, wire the route in main.go. FK violation (23503) -> 422.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/picks.go
- Modify: backend/main.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/picks.go", "backend/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["path UUID 400, body 400, 23503->422, other->500, success 201", "route registered in main.go", "just check passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Backend integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** testcontainers test: 201 + standings advance; unknown picker 422; malformed pickerId/JSON 400.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/picks_integration_test.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/picks_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -tags=integration -run '^TestCreatePickHandlerIntegration$' ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["201 + standings advance via GET /turn", "well-formed unknown picker 422", "malformed pickerId and JSON 400"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mobile picks API client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add recordPick (POST + 201 validation) and pure parsePick, with unit + real-server integration tests.

**Files:**
- Create: mobile/lib/picks.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/picks.test.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/picks.integration.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/picks.ts", "mobile/lib/picks.test.ts", "mobile/lib/picks.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/picks.test.ts lib/picks.integration.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parsePick validates 201 payload", "recordPick posts body and returns parsed Pick", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Tappable rows record tonight's pick
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make turn-screen rows tappable to record a member (local date, credited), then refetch /turn. Add pure todayLocalISO.

**Files:**
- Create: mobile/lib/date.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/date.test.ts
- Modify: mobile/App.tsx

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/date.ts", "mobile/lib/date.test.ts", "mobile/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["todayLocalISO formats device-local YYYY-MM-DD zero-padded", "tap records then refetches with in-flight lock; failure shown in error state", "just check passes"]}
```
